html:
Exclusive to:  

The Eyebrella is a Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC that equips to the head slot. It requires 1 Deerclops Eyeball, 15 Twigs, and 4 Bone Shards to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 55.5% of its durability. 

It provides 240 points of protection from Overheating and absolute protection from Rain and Lightning. 

The Eyebrella is considered to be an incredibly valuable dress item for both Spring and Summer, having the highest protective stats in game for the effects of both seasons. With careful use, the Eyebrella can be kept in good condition throughout Spring with only a single use of a Sewing Kit.

The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the Rain Coat to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent Rain of spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free.

While playing as WX-78, the Eyebrella will completely negate all rain damage with only one equipment slot required. It is worth noting, however, that the player will be unable to utilize a SYSTEM OVERLOAD while the item is equipped due to the protection from lightning. It is also wise for WX-78 to use the Eyebrella during Summer, as it will provide maximum overheating protection in the head slot without adding wetness and causing damage as some other dress items will.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, the Eyebrella crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a Blueprint for it can be bought with 300 Oincs from The Tinkerer's Tower. The Deerclops Eyeball is available at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium.

Trivia

  • The Eyebrella once temporarily replaced the Deerclops Eyeball.
  • The Eyebrella was originally a handheld umbrella before becoming a hat.
  • The word "Eyebrella" is a portmanteau of the words "Eye" and "Umbrella"

Gallery

  • Willow wearing an Eyebrella.

"eyebrellahat"
“It will watch over me.”
–Wilson
“If I wear it, I don't have to look at it...”
–Willow
“Is always looking up.”
–Wolfgang
“That's one stretchy eye.”
–Wendy
“EYE MATERIAL IS SURPRISINGLY ELASTIC”
–WX-78
“The cornea must be quite water-repellent.”
–Wickerbottom
“Always good to have something watching over you.”
–Woodie
“Eye to the sky.”
–Maxwell
“Perspicillum for precipitation.”
–Wagstaff
“Dön't get rain in yöur eye!”
–Wigfrid
“Disturbing, but it'll keep us dry.”
–Webber
“My third eye will protect me.”
–Walani
“"Eye" like it!”
–Warly
“Ye'll keep an eye out fer ol'Woodlegs.”
–Woodlegs
“PLUCKED EYE GIVETH WILBA A DRY HEAD”
–Wilba
“Peeping Rain Taker”
–Wormwood
“Guess it likes to look at the sky.”
–Wheeler
“Nice and dry underneath.”
–Winona
“A cyclops' sight stretched mighty thin.”
–Wortox
“What it looking at?”
–Wurt
“It keeps an eye on me. Get it? Because it's a giant eyeball?”
–Walter
“I don't like having eyes on me...”
–Wanda
The Eyebrella is a Dress Item from the Reign of Giants DLC that equips to the head slot. It requires 1 Deerclops Eyeball, 15 Twigs, and 4 Bone Shards to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. A Sewing Kit repairs 55.5% of its durability.

The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the Rain Coat to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent Rain of spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free.
While playing as WX-78, the Eyebrella will completely negate all rain damage with only one equipment slot required. It is worth noting, however, that the player will be unable to utilize a SYSTEM OVERLOAD while the item is equipped due to the protection from lightning. It is also wise for WX-78 to use the Eyebrella during Summer, as it will provide maximum overheating protection in the head slot without adding wetness and causing damage as some other dress items will.

It requires 1 [[Deerclops Eyeball]], 15 [[Twigs]], and 4 [[Bone Shards]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. A [[Sewing Kit]] repairs 55.5% of its durability.  It provides 240 points of protection from [[Overheating]] and absolute protection from [[Rain]] and [[Lightning]].  The Eyebrella is considered to be an incredibly valuable dress item for both [[Spring]] and [[Summer]], having the highest protective stats in game for the effects of both seasons. With careful use, the Eyebrella can be kept in good condition throughout Spring with only a single use of a [[Sewing Kit]]. The Eyebrella is the only item aside from the [[Rain Coat]] to provide 100% protection from wetness, which means that a player can protect against the frequent [[Rain]] of spring while keeping both the hands and chest slot free. While playing as [[WX-78]], the Eyebrella will completely negate all rain damage with only one equipment slot required. It is worth noting, however, that the player will be unable to utilize a SYSTEM OVERLOAD while the item is equipped due to the protection from lightning. It is also wise for WX-78 to use the Eyebrella during Summer, as it will provide maximum overheating protection in the head slot without adding wetness and causing damage as some other dress items will. == {{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the Eyebrella crafting recipe is unavailable, however, a [[Blueprint]] for it can be bought with 300 [[Oinc]]s from [[The Tinkerer's Tower]].
